import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const socket=io('http://localhost:5000');const ProgressBar=()=>{const[progress,setProgress]=useState(0);const[status,setStatus]=useState('Initializing rendering engine...');useEffect(()=>{// Listen for progress updates from FFmpeg

socket.on('render-status',msg=>{setStatus(msg);if(msg==='Complete!')setProgress(100);});socket.on('render-error',err=>{setStatus(`Error: ${err}`);});// Cleanup the listeners when the component unmounts
